title: Korean Skincare Routine for Nepali Skin Types
excerpt: Discover how the Korean skincare routine can be adapted for our climate and skin needs in Nepal. Get glowing, healthy skin with expert tips from our team.
body:
# Korean Skincare Routine for Nepali Skin Types

At Natural Beauty Clinic & Academy, we combine Korean-inspired skincare philosophy with personalized care for every client in Kathmandu.

## Why Korean Skincare Works

Korean skincare focuses on hydration, protection and nourishment — exactly what Nepali skin needs in our climate.

## Basic Steps to Follow

1. **Cleanser** — Double cleanse morning and night
2. **Toner** — Balance skin pH
3. **Serum** — Target specific concerns
4. **Moisturizer** — Lock in hydration
5. **SPF** — Protect from sun damage

Visit us at New Baneshwor for a personalized skin consultation using our AI Skin Analysis Machine!
author: Natural Beauty Team
